purpose: Declare qiaomu-ppt runtime dependencies for open-source installation and reproducible deck production.

external_tools.name: LibreOffice
external_tools.used_for: PPTX to PDF/image preview conversion and native export checks when PowerPoint/Keynote are unavailable.

external_tools.name: Poppler
external_tools.used_for: PDF text extraction and PDF-to-image thumbnail rendering.

external_tools.name: ImageMagick
external_tools.used_for: Optional image optimization, contact-sheet generation, and format conversion.

external_tools.name: Playwright Chromium
external_tools.used_for: Optional login/JS-heavy page capture when direct URL ingestion is blocked.
external_tools.install: python3 -m pip install playwright && python3 -m playwright install chromium

fonts.note: Font binaries are not committed by default to keep the repository small; they are declared and downloadable.

degradation_policy: If Python URL packages are missing, run scripts/bootstrap.py --install-python or use direct Markdown/local files.
If LibreOffice is missing, do not claim PPTX-to-PDF preview verification.
If Poppler is missing, use pypdf fallback for PDF text extraction and mark layout fidelity as missing evidence.
If fonts are missing, use system CJK fonts and record typography as missing evidence for exact rendering.
